g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does ResumeIQ extract text from PDF files?')
sendPrompt('What happens when PDF text extraction fails in ResumeIQ?')
sendPrompt('Why do we split resume into chunks for RAG?')
sendPrompt('What is a sentence transformer and how does it create embeddings?')
sendPrompt('How does FAISS store and search vectors?')
g.text: All embeddings stored in RAM index

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the user question converted to a vector in ResumeIQ?')
sendPrompt('How does FAISS cosine similarity search work?')
g.text: Question vector matched to top 3 chunks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the RAG prompt structured in ResumeIQ?')
sendPrompt('Which Ollama models are used in ResumeIQ and why?')
g.text: qwen3 / deepseek reads prompt and replies

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the retrieved chunks expander show in ResumeIQ?')
g.text: Answer shown with retrieved chunks visible

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does ResumeIQ generate interview questions from a resume?')
g.text: Full resume sent to Ollama as prompt
